title: emilia juncea var. juncea
intro: Emilia juncea var. juncea, commonly known as the fetid or stinking rosemallow, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Emilia juncea var. juncea include its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with colds, flu, and digestive issues.
